pr.title: Record: LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1194 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines LeakyReLU² MLPs, legal score-first TTT, and parameter banking with Parallel Muon in the 10min/16MB stack.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT trains only on scored validation chunks (score-first sliding eval then SGD per chunk) before final scoring.
techniques: - LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLPs preserve gradient flow through the dense blocks
- Legal score-first TTT: sliding-window scoring then 3-epoch SGD per validation chunk
- Parameter Banking plus Parallel Muon optimizer for efficient steps
